items.headline: After setback, Doyle resumes rehab assignment with power display

news_items.headline: Orioles fail to sweep Reds, drop finale 3-2
news_items.summary: For the seventh time this year, the O’s failed to win with a chance at a four-game win streak.

news_items.headline: Cincinnati Reds hang on to beat Orioles in Sunday series finale
news_items.summary: The Reds salvaged a game from this otherwise disappointing series against Baltimore.

news_items.headline: Pérez exits after 92 mph liner from Soto hits arm
Twins star Buxton leaves game with hip injury
news_items.summary: Twins All-Star center fielder Byron Buxton left Sunday's game against the Yankees following the first inning after aggravating a hip injury.

news_items.headline: Brewers' Woodruff (shoulder) put back on IL
news_items.summary: Brewers right-hander Brandon Woodruff has gone back on the injured list with inflammation in his throwing shoulder, one day after a drop in velocity led to his early exit from a start against the Diamondbacks.

news_items.headline: Guardians' Ramírez (hand) progressing; BP soon
news_items.summary: José Ramírez has made steady progress in his recovery from hand surgery, and the Guardians star third baseman will soon start taking batting practice.

news_items.headline: Ohtani, Freeman lead Dodgers' 4 All-Star starters
news_items.summary: Shohei Ohtani will be joined by three Los Angeles teammates in the NL's starting lineup, while the Dodgers, Braves and Phillies will each send five players to the July 14 All-Star Game.

news_items.headline: Fried faces hitters for 2nd time since elbow injur...
news_items.summary: Yankees starting pitcher Max Fried inched closer to a possible minor league rehab assignment, throwing 36 pitches in his second two-inning simulated game.

news_items.headline: All-Star Alvarez walks off Rays in multi-HR night
news_items.summary: Yordan Alvarez added to his AL home run lead with a walk-off against the Rays, his second homer of the game.

news_items.headline: 'Emotional' Contreras apologizes for on-field flap...
news_items.summary: Red Sox first baseman Willson Contreras offered an emotional apology for his involvement in a pair of bench-clearing incidents against the Yankees and Nationals this past week.
